name: Sentinel Holdings Ltd.
summary: PART I . Overview Sentinel Holdings Ltd, a Nevada corporation (the Company), conducts its business through its wholly owned subsidiary, United Security Specialists Inc. (USS), and its majority-owned subsidiary, Gladiator Solutions Inc. (Gladiator). Effective April 2, 2025, the Company changed its name to Sentinel Holdings Ltd.. USS provides professional security personnel and services, enhanced by smartphone-based security applications, while Gladiators operations, previously focused on personal...
